title: Iron Chests (Fabric)
description: A complete Fabric port of the original Iron Chest mod.
body:
# Iron Chests

[Fabric] Iron Chests is a complete Fabric port of the original Iron Chest mod. It adds a variety of new chests to the game with varying storage sizes and unique features. Each chest can each be upgraded over time as you collect and store more materials, adding a new system of progression to the game! </br></br>

![header](https://i.imgur.com/FrlRhb2.png)

Crafting Recipes: https://feed-the-beast.fandom.com/wiki/Iron_Chests

Dependencies: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) </br></br>
